name: Kahani Indian Street Food Edinburgh
description: Edinburgh's award-winning Indian street food restaurant, specialising in authentic dishes like chicken tikka masala, biryani, butter chicken, tandoori lamb chops, and vegetable pakora.
allergenNotice: Please inform your server of any allergies or food intolerances you may have. Products may contain peanuts, tree nuts, soy, dairy, eggs, wheat, shellfish, fish, and other allergens. A full allergen chart is available on request.
